description: Update Shared Email Provider. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/shared_email_providers/{id}. Required parameters: id, company_id. Optional parameters include name, signature, visibility.

params.name: id
params.description: Shared Email Provider ID to update

params.name: name
params.description: New name of Shared Email Provider

params.name: signature
params.description: New signature of Shared Email Provider
